'''鈭歭-w-j''' ('''kalawaj''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:danken|danken]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| l-w-j
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:danken|danken]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歭-w-j
|-
! Lemma
| kalawaj
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thilawaj|thilawaj]] || [[word:jilawaj|jilawaj]] || [[word:shilawaj|shilawaj]] || [[word:kilawaj|kilawaj]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthulawaj|thuthulawaj]] || [[word:jujulawaj|jujulawaj]] || [[word:shushulawaj|shushulawaj]] || [[word:kukulawaj|kukulawaj]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thulawaj|thulawaj]] || [[word:julawaj|julawaj]] || [[word:shulawaj|shulawaj]] || [[word:kulawaj|kulawaj]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thulawaj|thulawaj]] || [[word:julawaj|julawaj]] || [[word:shulawaj|shulawaj]] || [[word:kulawaj|kulawaj]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thelawaj|thelawaj]] || [[word:jelawaj|jelawaj]] || [[word:shelawaj|shelawaj]] || [[word:kelawaj|kelawaj]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thotholawaj|thotholawaj]] || [[word:jojolawaj|jojolawaj]] || [[word:shosholawaj|shosholawaj]] || [[word:kokolawaj|kokolawaj]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:tholawaj|tholawaj]] || [[word:jolawaj|jolawaj]] || [[word:sholawaj|sholawaj]] || [[word:kolawaj|kolawaj]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:tholawaj|tholawaj]] || [[word:jolawaj|jolawaj]] || [[word:sholawaj|sholawaj]] || [[word:kolawaj|kolawaj]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:lawaj|lawaj]] || [[word:lawaj|lawaj]] || [[word:lawaj|lawaj]] || [[word:lawaj|lawaj]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:lawaj|lawaj]] || [[word:lawaj|lawaj]] || [[word:lawaj|lawaj]] || [[word:lawaj|lawaj]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:lawaj|lawaj]] || [[word:lawaj|lawaj]] || [[word:lawaj|lawaj]] || [[word:lawaj|lawaj]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:lawaj|lawaj]] || [[word:lawaj|lawaj]] || [[word:lawaj|lawaj]] || [[word:lawaj|lawaj]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙lawaj|th忙lawaj]] || [[word:j忙lawaj|j忙lawaj]] || [[word:sh忙lawaj|sh忙lawaj]] || [[word:k忙lawaj|k忙lawaj]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathalawaj|thathalawaj]] || [[word:jajalawaj|jajalawaj]] || [[word:shashalawaj|shashalawaj]] || [[word:kakalawaj|kakalawaj]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thalawaj|thalawaj]] || [[word:jalawaj|jalawaj]] || [[word:shalawaj|shalawaj]] || [[word:kalawaj|kalawaj]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thalawaj|thalawaj]] || [[word:jalawaj|jalawaj]] || [[word:shalawaj|shalawaj]] || [[word:kalawaj|kalawaj]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shalawaj|shalawaj]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshalawaj|goshalawaj]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishalawaj|gokishalawaj]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shalawajn眉|shalawajn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshalawajnkn眉|goshalawajnkn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishalawajn眉|gokishalawajn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shalawajsh毛|shalawajsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshalawajnksh毛|goshalawajnksh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishalawajsh毛|gokishalawajsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shalawajro|shalawajro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshalawajnkro|goshalawajnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishalawajro|gokishalawajro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shalawajmu|shalawajmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshalawajnkmu|goshalawajnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishalawajmu|gokishalawajmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shalawajsher|shalawajsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshalawajnksher|goshalawajnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishalawajsher|gokishalawajsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shalawajng|shalawajng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshalawajnkng|goshalawajnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishalawajng|gokishalawajng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shalawajya|shalawajya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshalawajnkya|goshalawajnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishalawajya|gokishalawajya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shalawajyam|shalawajyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshalawajnkyam|goshalawajnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishalawajyam|gokishalawajyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shalawajn眉sh毛|shalawajn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshalawajnkn眉sh毛|goshalawajnkn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishalawajn眉sh毛|gokishalawajn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shalawajn眉ro|shalawajn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshalawajnkn眉ro|goshalawajnkn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishalawajn眉ro|gokishalawajn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shalawajn眉mu|shalawajn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshalawajnkn眉mu|goshalawajnkn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishalawajn眉mu|gokishalawajn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shalawajsh毛n眉|shalawajsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshalawajnksh毛n眉|goshalawajnksh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishalawajsh毛n眉|gokishalawajsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shalawajsh毛ro|shalawajsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshalawajnksh毛ro|goshalawajnksh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishalawajsh毛ro|gokishalawajsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shalawajsh毛mu|shalawajsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshalawajnksh毛mu|goshalawajnksh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishalawajsh毛mu|gokishalawajsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shalawajron眉|shalawajron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshalawajnkron眉|goshalawajnkron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishalawajron眉|gokishalawajron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shalawajrosh毛|shalawajrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshalawajnkrosh毛|goshalawajnkrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishalawajrosh毛|gokishalawajrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shalawajromu|shalawajromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshalawajnkromu|goshalawajnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishalawajromu|gokishalawajromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shalawajmun眉|shalawajmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshalawajnkmun眉|goshalawajnkmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishalawajmun眉|gokishalawajmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shalawajmush毛|shalawajmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshalawajnkmush毛|goshalawajnkmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishalawajmush毛|gokishalawajmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shalawajmuro|shalawajmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshalawajnkmuro|goshalawajnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishalawajmuro|gokishalawajmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==

{{wordpage|17228b0}}
